description_long: This object is a heavily damaged and partially stripped washing machine, with its outer casing torn and deformed, exposing the internal drum and mechanical components. The front side reveals a large circular drum opening, surrounded by a thick rubber gasket, and remnants of the control panel are visible at the top. The sides and back are severely dented and punctured, with jagged edges and missing panels, revealing the machine's internal structure and wiring. The top panel is bent upward, further exposing the inner workings and electrical parts. The overall color is a dirty white with patches of rust, grime, and exposed metal, indicating significant wear and exposure to the elements. This washing machine appears abandoned or discarded, likely found in an urban alley, junkyard, or roadside.
description: A battered, partially stripped washing machine with a torn white exterior, exposed drum, and damaged top panel. The object shows heavy wear, rust, and internal components visible from multiple sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the circular drum opening, thick rubber gasket, and remnants of the control panel at the top, with much of the internal structure exposed.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a heavily punctured and torn metal panel, with circular impressions and jagged holes revealing the interior.
description_view_2: The back view features a deformed and partially missing rear panel, with exposed wiring and mechanical parts visible through large gaps.
description_view_3: The right side view shows more torn and punctured metal, with several large holes and a clear view into the machine's interior.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front edge, partially detached and bent upward, with some buttons and dials visible but no clear labeling or display.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading circular door, made of metal and possibly glass, with a thick rubber gasket; the handle or latch mechanism is not clearly visible due to damage.
attribute_drum_visibility: fully visible through the front opening, with the drum and some internal components exposed
